subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all mention and utterance and whatsoever existeth in the contingent realm, beseemeth that Most Desired Lord Who, through a single will, brought being into existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان و ما فی الامکان سزاوار حضرت مقصودیست که بیک اراده وجود
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @transcendence; unknowability of God
